message:
fix: skip Viper defaults in getRoutingConfigValue to unblock DB fallback (bd-2qef)

getRoutingConfigValue checked config.GetString() first, which returned Viper
defaults (e.g. "~/.beads-planning" for routing.contributor) even when no YAML
config was present. This shadowed DB-stored values, causing
TestDetermineAutoRoutedRepoPath_ContributorToPlanning and
TestOpenRoutedReadStore_ContributorRouting to fail.

Now uses config.GetValueSource() to only trust explicitly-set values (config
file, env var, or runtime Set()), falling through to the DB for defaults.
Also tracks runtime Set() calls in overriddenKeys so GetValueSource can
distinguish them from Viper defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/refinery
